sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102738" key="taxu/teknos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰχύ-τεκνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102738.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quickly productive of children</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">-όταται μίξεις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.26</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
